text: To reset your password, click Forgot password on the login page and follow the link sent to your email.
You can change the credit card on file under Settings, Billing, Payment method.
Cancel your plan anytime from Settings, Billing, Cancel subscription. Access continues until the period ends.
Turn on two-factor authentication in Settings, Security to require a one-time code at login.
Export your data as CSV from Settings, Data, Export. Large exports are emailed when ready.
Invite a teammate from Settings, Team, Invite member and assign them a role.
Refunds are available within 14 days of purchase. Contact billing support to request one.
Our mobile app is available for iOS and Android in the respective app stores.
Developer API documentation, including authentication and endpoints, is at docs.example.com slash api.
Enable dark mode from Settings, Appearance, Theme.
Support is available Monday to Friday, 9am to 6pm in your local time zone.
Change your account email under Settings, Profile, Email, then confirm via the verification link.
Permanently delete your account from Settings, Privacy, Delete account. This cannot be undone.
Upgrade or downgrade your plan under Settings, Billing, Change plan.
Connect Slack from Settings, Integrations to receive notifications in your channels.
If you cannot log in, clear your browser cache, check caps lock, or reset your password.
Download past invoices from Settings, Billing, Invoices.
Manage email and push notifications under Settings, Notifications.
